title: SOFTWARE ANALYST
description:
about the company

A leading financial services organization with a global presence, dedicated to driving digital transformation and excellence in banking technology. The culture is built on high-performance standards and a collaborative, mission-critical environment.

about the job

This is a pivotal opportunity for an experienced technical specialist to oversee system stability and performance within a high-availability production environment.

  • Manage the full lifecycle of technical incidents to ensure adherence to global service standards.

  • Troubleshoot and resolve complex system issues across distributed technologies and mobile platforms.

  • Perform root cause analysis to implement preventative measures and minimize system downtime.

  • Coordinate with cross-functional development teams and external partners to enhance platform performance.

  • Generate analytical reports on system metrics to drive continuous process improvements.

skills and experience required

  • At least 6 years of experience in technical support, specifically within the banking or financial services sector.

  • Proven expertise in L2/L3 production support for mission-critical applications and distributed technologies.

  • Strong technical competency in managing containerized platforms and microservices infrastructures.

  • Proficiency in working with RDBMS, messaging systems, and scripting for system debugging.

  • Solid understanding of service management methodologies and structured change management processes.

Please click on the 'apply' button to apply online. For more information, please reach out to Amrita Chandran. (EA: 94C3609 / R1440037)

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
postedCompany.name: RANDSTAD PTE. LIMITED
